rationale_notes: moral_theological_position lands on the canonical 'Jesus means mercy to me' clause, normalized from the source's quoted form 'He means mercy to me' via the encoder's normalize_theological_line. This is the load-bearing theological signature for Pastor Rick.

wound_longing carries the 'steadier than his fear, kinder than his shame' line — Pastor Rick's identity prose has no clean longing-coded sentence, so the paired selector falls back to the wound side. The fear/shame/weakness trio is the wound; the longing 'I don't have to save myself' is in the same paragraph but split across sentence boundaries, and the highest-scoring wound line wins.

refusal_shape captures the two genuine prose-extracted refusals after the needle tightening. The compassion line ('He loves with a compassion…') and the theological assertion ('does not get the final word') are correctly excluded.
voice_lift carries only the single voice_rules entry; Pastor Rick's voice is mostly carried by his identity prose rather than by separately-listed voice rules.

fact_atom is intentionally sparse — only one backstory_fact is listed for Pastor Rick. The identity prose carries the rest, which the harness honors via attachment_node and refusal_shape rather than duplicating into facts.
